name: Monolithe Synaptique
description: Lourde unité d'appui renforcée, véritable forteresse mobile. Ses implants surdimensionnés font de lui un mini-relais tactique ambulant.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Massive reinforced infantry support unit, towering figure in oversized dark grey armor with multiple antenna arrays and cold blue neural light halo, thick black cables like a nest of snakes behind skull. Heavy geometric weapon, standing immovable, dystopian dark battlefield, cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
